description_long: This is a modern armchair with a deep blue, textured fabric upholstery and a minimalist design. The seat and backrest are generously padded, providing comfort, and the chair includes two large, light gray cushions placed on the seat and back. The armrests are integrated into the chair's body, forming a continuous, angular silhouette with the seat and backrest. The chair stands on a sleek, black metal sled base, giving it a lightweight and contemporary appearance. The backrest is high and slightly winged, offering support and a sense of enclosure. The overall look is stylish and suitable for urban parks, lobbies, or outdoor seating areas.
description: A modern blue upholstered armchair with a high back, integrated armrests, two light gray cushions, and a black metal sled base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the high blue backrest, integrated armrests, and two light gray cushions on the seat.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the chair's deep seat, thick padding, and the angular profile of the armrest and backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, continuous blue upholstery and the full width of the high backrest.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same angular armrest and the arrangement of the cushions from a different angle.
attribute_armrest_design: integrated, angular, upholstered in blue fabric
attribute_backrest_style: high, slightly winged, continuous with seat, blue fabric
